requirements.title: Hierarchical Traffic Routing
requirements.description: Support Campaign -> Stream -> [Lander] -> Offer structure

requirements.title: Stream Tiers
requirements.description: Implement Forced, Regular, and Default stream types

requirements.title: Multi-tier Selection
requirements.description: Select streams based on priority: Forced (Position) -> Regular (Weight/Position) -> Default

requirements.title: Advanced Filtering
requirements.description: Filter traffic by Geo, Device, Connection, Schedule, and Custom Parameters

requirements.title: Rotation Engines
requirements.description: Weighted rotation for Regular streams, Landers, and Offers

requirements.title: Action Handlers
requirements.description: 19 action types: HttpRedirect, Meta, DoubleMeta, Js, JsIframe, Frame, Iframe, Curl, RemoteProxy, etc.

requirements.title: Macro Substitution
requirements.description: 40+ macros: {click_id}, {subid}, {country}, {device}, {cost}, {payout}, etc.

requirements.title: Throughput
requirements.description: Sustain 10k+ RPS on single optimized instance

requirements.title: Latency
requirements.description: Maintain sub-10ms processing latency for hot-path

requirements.title: Resource Efficiency
requirements.description: Minimize heap allocations to prevent GC pauses

requirements.title: High Availability
requirements.description: Support stateless pipeline instances with shared Valkey state

requirements.title: CSPRNG Click IDs
requirements.description: Generate cryptographically secure click identifiers (24-char hex: 8 timestamp + 16 random)

requirements.title: JA3/TLS Fingerprinting
requirements.description: Extract JA3/JA4/TLS fingerprints for bot detection
requirements.note: Fields exist in RawClick model, no extraction yet

requirements.title: Cloaking / Safe-Page
requirements.description: Serve safe content to detected bots while redirecting real traffic

requirements.title: Behavioral Detection
requirements.description: HideClickDetect, ImkloDetect, JsFingerprint filters with bot score checks

requirements.title: IP/CIDR Blacklisting
requirements.description: Block traffic from known bad IPs/CIDRs

requirements.title: Real-time Analytics
requirements.description: ClickHouse queue writer with batch inserts

requirements.title: Postback Processing
requirements.description: Handler with HMAC validation for affiliate network conversions

requirements.title: Conversion Attribution
requirements.description: Token-based attribution via {click_id} macros

requirements.title: Payout/Cost Tracking
requirements.description: Cost/payout calculated in pipeline stages 16-17

requirements.title: Uniqueness Tracking
requirements.description: Enforce uniqueness limits using Valkey

requirements.title: Admin API
requirements.description: 26 files: handlers for campaigns, streams, offers, landings, networks, domains, sources, users, bots, settings, reports, postbacks

requirements.title: Metadata Storage
requirements.description: PostgreSQL for persistent configuration storage

requirements.title: Dashboard
requirements.description: Web interface for campaign management and analytics
